scripts.build: pnpm --filter @mariozechner/pi-tui run build && pnpm --filter @mariozechner/pi-ai run build && pnpm --filter @mariozechner/pi-agent-core run build && pnpm --filter @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent run build && pnpm --filter @mariozechner/pi-mom run build && pnpm --filter @mariozechner/pi-web-ui run build && pnpm --filter @mariozechner/pi run build
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "ai,agent,coding-agent,mom,web-ui,tui" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,red,white,green,magenta" "pnpm --filter @mariozechner/pi-ai run dev" "pnpm --filter @mariozechner/pi-agent-core run dev" "pnpm --filter @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent run dev" "pnpm --filter @mariozechner/pi-mom run dev" "pnpm --filter @mariozechner/pi-web-ui run dev" "pnpm --filter @mariozechner/pi-tui run dev"
scripts.check: biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && tsgo --noEmit && pnpm run check:browser-smoke && pnpm --filter @mariozechner/pi-web-ui run check
scripts.version:patch: pnpm --filter "@mariozechner/*" exec -- npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && pnpm install
scripts.version:minor: pnpm --filter "@mariozechner/*" exec -- npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && pnpm install
scripts.version:major: pnpm --filter "@mariozechner/*" exec -- npm version major --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && pnpm install
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build && pnpm run check
scripts.publish: pnpm run prepublishOnly && pnpm publish -r --access public
scripts.publish:dry: pnpm run prepublishOnly && pnpm publish -r --access public --dry-run
